title: McCarthy Tétrault strengthens its national M&A and Agribusiness practice with former vice president and general counsel, Tom Mix
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault strengthens its national M&A and Agribusiness practice with former vice president and general counsel, Tom Mix
Tom Mix , former Vice President and General Counsel, Mergers & Acquisitions and Strategic Projects, at a leading agriculture firm, has joined McCarthy Tétrault’s leading national M&A team as a partner based in the firm’s Calgary office.
Tom brings more than two decades of experience to the firm, with extensive international expertise in leading and managing complex global M&A activities and teams, foreign regulatory compliance, domestic/international government relations, shareholder activism preparation, corporate governance and strategic value optimization. His innovative strategies have expanded global footprints, optimized operations, and earned well-deserved recognition by prestigious legal organizations and awards for his transformative M&A achievements.
“We’re excited to have Tom join our National Business Law group. His outstanding reputation as a leader in the international agriculture sector will be of immense value to our Canadian and international clients.” said Eva Bellissimo , Partner and National Business Law Practice Group Leader. “With his strong foundation as an active general counsel skilled in complex international M&A transactions, Tom’s strategic and innovative approach to doing business gives clients unparalleled support on their cross-border deals.”
With expertise in the industries that matter most to the global business landscape, our M&A Group has the proven experience to get deals done. Clients benefit from our history of industry-focused advice and perspective. No matter the size or complexity, McCarthy Tétrault has a leading position advising on the transactions most important to your business, such as mergers, acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures and partnerships in a wide range of industries. Our M&A Group specializes in advising clients on the largest and most innovative domestic and international deals. We have knowledge and expertise in every type of M&A transaction and we have played a principal role acting for every type of transaction participant. Learn how our team can help you.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca
- Tom Mix Partner People.Offices.Singular Calgary
